data.body: Held-out validation and local preflight complete. Standard-tier implementer: 1 substantive attempt. Full restored oracle: 15 passed. Defect-seeded mutation changed over-cap from > to >=; held-out exact-cap boundary failed (2 vs 1) and returned green after restoration. Refactoring litmus passes: tests assert public function values, registry contracts, and real command output; provenance/uniqueness assertions are explicit public contracts. Gates: make lint green; mypy green over 379 source files; make test green with 7,091 passed, 37 skipped, 114 deselected. Five-axis review found no blockers: exact boundary/no-cap behavior, config-backed SCC adaptation, structural provenance, honest Unavailable, deleted legacy cap reader, no dependency/security expansion, and files 198/150/163 LOC. SCC is invoked once per size spec by this ticket's prescribed adapter; the already-recorded dependent story c23 owns per-evaluation composition/caching.
